data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House3/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House3_Text_WillingToTrad:
Hello, TRAINER. Would you do me a favor
and trade POKéMON with me?\pLiving in PACIFIDLOG, I can only catch
certain kinds of POKéMON.\p{STR_VAR_1}? Do you have one?
I'll trade you my {STR_VAR_2} for it.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House3/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House3_Text_NowWereFriend: Since we traded, you and me,\nwe're friends, aren't we?
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House3/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House3_Text_IsThatAPokede: Is that a POKéDEX?\pDid you get to meet a lot of different\nPOKéMON?\pI wish I was like you.
